tweets.text: @s_m_i Any particular suggestions?

@s_m_i I don't think it is impossible, but I think it would be much harder for smaller or newer institutions than it would for places like WaPo – if you leave journalism entirely to the free market, wouldn't companies choose to sponsor outlets they knew they could influence?
@s_m_i But what happens when it comes time for one of those newsrooms to report on one of those companies? What if they depend significantly on that enterprise account?
